spec.goal: Close the self-review gaps in review-repair's GitHub thread resolve guidance by making the lookup output enough data to identify the right thread and by tightening smoke coverage around the documented query and mutations.
success_criteria: review-repair/SKILL.md documents a thread lookup query that returns enough context to match a thread to the repaired comment thread
review-repair/SKILL.md still documents the resolveReviewThread and unresolveReviewThread mutation path
dev/review-repair/run_smoke.py asserts key query and mutation snippets instead of only loose token presence
focused verification passes after the follow-up edits
the installed runtime review-repair skill is resynced to match the updated source skill
constraints: Keep the change scoped to review-repair, its smoke, and this follow-up plan
Do not broaden the review lifecycle or rename skills
Prefer compact, actionable command examples over large wrappers

tasks.title: Make thread lookup actionable
tasks.objective: Update review-repair's default reviewThreads query so it returns enough context to map a thread ID to the addressed review comment thread.
outputs: Updated GitHub thread lookup query guidance

tasks.title: Tighten smoke assertions
tasks.objective: Replace loose token checks with assertions that lock the key reviewThreads query line and the resolve/unresolve mutation lines.
outputs: Stronger smoke assertions for the concrete command contract

tasks.title: Verify and sync runtime skill
tasks.objective: Run focused verification, hot-sync the installed review-repair skill, and record evidence in the follow-up plan state.

triggers: The GitHub reviewThreads query needs a helper script instead of compact inline guidance
The command examples conflict with a repo-approved wrapper discovered during implementation
Runtime sync requires broader Home Manager changes beyond the installed skill directory

evidence: 2026-03-19: Expanded the review-repair reviewThreads query to return isOutdated, path, line, startLine, and the latest comment author/body/url so a repaired thread can be matched to the correct THREAD_ID before resolveReviewThread runs.

2026-03-19: Tightened dev/review-repair/run_smoke.py to assert the actionable thread-matching sentence plus the concrete reviewThreads and resolve/unresolve mutation blocks instead of only loose token presence.
2026-03-19: Verified the follow-up with python3 dev/review-repair/run_smoke.py and git diff --check.
2026-03-19: Hot-synced /Users/xavier/.codex/skills/review-repair/SKILL.md and confirmed the installed runtime copy contains the stronger thread lookup and mutation guidance.

local_checkpoint.current_theory: The new CLI guidance still leaves enough ambiguity in thread selection that multi-thread PRs are not safely actionable, and the smoke still allows command-shape regressions.
local_checkpoint.contradictory_evidence: The current skill at least names the GraphQL entrypoints and passes its focused smoke.
local_checkpoint.missing_evidence: Need a lookup query shape that exposes stable thread-identifying context and a smoke that asserts the real query and mutation fragments.
local_checkpoint.next_action: Patch review-repair/SKILL.md and dev/review-repair/run_smoke.py, then rerun focused verification and resync the installed skill.
